# mcp-builder Skill Index

- SKILL.md: Manifest and usage
- README.md: Directory overview
- scripts/
  - create-mcp-project.sh: Scaffold new MCP projects
  - validate_mcp.py: Validate MCP compliance
  - validate_mcp.sh: Bash wrapper for validation
- templates/
  - rust/: Rust starter (Cargo.toml, main.rs)
  - python/: Python starter (**init**.py)
  - ts/: TypeScript starter (index.ts, package.json)
  - README.md: Template overview
